caption: A man with a tall, spiky grey wig, eyeglasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and suspenders, sitting with his arms crossed. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, and the background features a wall decorated with several framed photographs and posters. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left featuring a microphone icon with the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another in the center with the text "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his gaze slightly and moving his mouth as if speaking. The camera angle and the environment remain static throughout the clip, focusing entirely on the man's upper body and facial expressions.
